goal: Share-page fallback button 'Read Card Meaning' led to a failing link; change it to 'Back to Homepage'
root_cause: On the share page (share/index.html, #backToReading), the secondary action was 'Read Card Meaning' pointing at resolveCardMeaningPath() / canonicalUrl / /reading.html — which fails in the share / in-app-browser context (no reading state).
fix: Relabeled to 'Back to Homepage' / 'กลับหน้าแรก' and pointed it at the homepage (lang==='th' ? '/th/' : '/') in both the static HTML and share.js render path. resolveCardMeaningPath() is now unused (left in place).
verified: Static HTML updated to 'Back to Homepage' href='/'; share.js sets localized label + homepage href on render. node --check share.js passes.
